# Code of Conduct

PostCode is a small project, and the space around it should be welcoming and respectful to everyone.

## Expected behaviour

- Be respectful and considerate in your language and tone.
- Give and accept constructive feedback gracefully.
- Focus on what's best for the project and the people who use it.

## Unacceptable behaviour

- Harassment, insults, or derogatory comments.
- Discrimination or hateful language of any kind.
- Personal or political attacks.
- Publishing someone else's private information without their permission.
- Anything else a reasonable person would consider inappropriate.

## Scope

This applies across all project spaces — GitHub issues, discussions, and commit comments — and anywhere someone is representing the project in public.

## Enforcement

The maintainer upholds this code and may edit or remove comments, lock threads, or block accounts that violate it.

To report a concern privately, use the repository's [private reporting](https://github.com/mrtymcln/PostCode/security/advisories/new): the **Security** tab → **Report a vulnerability**, which reaches the maintainer privately.

For content you believe may be abusive or harassing, you can also [report it to GitHub directly](https://github.com/contact/report-abuse).

Reports will be handled discreetly.
